system.description:
What it does (SRD): Exceptional reflexes help against bursts, lines, and traps. This entry is not the Dodge feat (no +1 dodge bonus to AC). It applies a +1 bonus on Reflex saving throws only.

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, the +1 is entered in Mechanical effects (labeled Reflexive dodge). It stacks with Dexterity and other Reflex bonuses from feats, equipment, and conditions.
